name: @acoyfellow/cinder
description: open source CI runner acceleration on cloudflare

scripts.build:workers: cargo install worker-build@^0.1 --locked && cargo install wasm-bindgen-cli --version 0.2.114 --locked --force && cd crates/cinder-orchestrator && WASM_BINDGEN_BIN=$HOME/.cargo/bin/wasm-bindgen worker-build --release && cd ../cinder-cache && WASM_BINDGEN_BIN=$HOME/.cargo/bin/wasm-bindgen worker-build --release
